zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Sergeaux於大約1378年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir Richard Sergeaux II50歲，母親Phillipa Arundel29歲。她於大約1400年與Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年7月13日在英國肯特享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Sergeaux于大约1378年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard Sergeaux II50岁，母亲Phillipa Arundel29岁。她于大约1400年与Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年7月13日在英国肯特享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 馬比。

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Sergeaux was born about 1378, in Cornwall, England, her father, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, was 50 and her mother, Phillipa Arundel, was 29. She married Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst about 1400, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 July 1420, in Kent, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Sergeaux est née environ 1378, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Phillipa Arundel, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst environ 1400, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 juillet 1420, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Mary Chapel of Colquite, St Mabyn,: St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Sergeaux um 1378 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Sergeaux II 50 und ihre Mutter Phillipa Arundel 29. Sie hat um 1400 in England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Juli 1420 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Sergeaux è nata il circa 1378 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Phillipa Arundel, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst circa 1400, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 luglio 1420, nel Kent, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Sergeauxが約1378年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Sergeaux IIは50歳，母Phillipa Arundelは29歳であった。約1400年にイギリスイギリスでSir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年7月13日にイギリスケントで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト マブインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Sergeaux(이)가 대략 1378년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Sergeaux II(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Phillipa Arundel(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 7월 13일 영국 켄트에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Sergeaux nasceu aproximadamente 1378, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Phillipa Arundel, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst aproximadamente 1400, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de julho de 1420, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Saint Mary Chapel of Colquite, St Mabyn,: St Mabyn, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Sergeaux родилась около 1378 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Sergeaux II было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Phillipa Arundel, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst около 1400 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 июля 1420 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa Sergeaux nació aproximadamente 1378, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Sergeaux II, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Phillipa Arundel, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst aproximadamente 1400, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de julio de 1420, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
